1- MONEAGUE ,  St. Ann ,  Moneague

Site Infl.View - Mountain, Central location, Easy Access, Hillside, Private Setting, Rural Setting, Quiet Area, No Thru Road, Level Lot
ShowHide Description

If you're looking for peace and quiet, that's not too secluded, this project might be perfect for you. This historic 4 bedroom bungalow that's over 150 years old is on two and a half acres of land In a cool climate where anthuriums and orchids grow wild and fireplaces were once common and with easy ...

If you're looking for peace and quiet, that's not too secluded, this project might be perfect for you. This historic 4 bedroom bungalow that's over 150 years old is on two and a half acres of land In a cool climate where anthuriums and orchids grow wild and fireplaces were once common and with easy access to the North-South Highway once rebuilt this property could be the perfect country retreat....Perfect for ones retirement, family escapes or for a unique Airbnb experience

 Read moreShow less View Detail
